chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3663 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْمَغْرَاءِ قَالَ : سَأَلَ رَجُلٌ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ أَنَا عِنْدَهُ فَقَالَ أَصْلَحَكَ اَللَّهُ أَمُرُّ بِالْعَامِلِ أَوْ آتِي اَلْعَامِلَ فَيُجِيزُنِي بِالدَّرَاهِمِ آخُذُهَا قَالَ "نَعَمْ" قُلْتُ وَ أَحُجُّ بِهَا قَالَ "نَعَمْ وَ حُجَّ بِهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3663 - It is narrated from Abu al-Maghra, who said: A man asked Abu Abdullah (as), while I was present, 'May Allah (swt) rectify your affairs. I pass by the official or go to the official, and he grants me dirhams. Should I take them?'
Imam (as) said: 'Yes.'
I asked: 'Can I perform Hajj with them?'
Imam (as) said: 'Yes, and perform Hajj with them.'
